caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" speaks into a professional black microphone in a room filled with sports memorabilia and clothing. He is positioned in front of a wall adorned with framed sports photos and near a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt. To his right, clothing racks hold various garments. The man gesticulates with his right hand as he speaks, moving his hand from his face in the beginning to an open gesture. A red and white logo is visible in the lower-left corner of each frame, and red text that reads "BALLY TV" appears in the lower-right. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up as his facial expressions and hand movements shift while he talks.
